headline: How Warren Buffett Just Became More Heavily Invested In 'Rat Poison' Cryptocurrency
summary: Known as the “Oracle of Omaha” and by other nicknames, legendary investor Warren Buffett is a man of many names. Buffett also gives out nicknames from time to time, including calling leading cryptocurrency Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) “rat poison squared.”

headline: Netflix Adds Disclaimer That One Show Is Fictional: Here's The Show And Why
